steps.title: Find the total weight loss
steps.content:
The bear went from $356$ pounds to $321$ pounds, so the total weight loss was
$$356-321=35$$

steps.title: Divide by the daily loss
steps.content:
The bear lost $0.7$ pound per day, so the number of days is
$$\frac{35}{0.7}=50$$
The answer is 50.
